scripts.dev:main: tsup electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --format cjs --external electron --out-dir dist-electron --target node20 --watch --silent
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist-electron/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electronmon .
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.build:main: tsup electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --format cjs --external electron --out-dir dist-electron --target node20 --clean
